mapper.sql: id, symbol, name, asset_type, market, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM asset_info ORDER BY sort_order DESC, id DESC
SELECT FROM asset_info WHERE symbol = #{symbol} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_info (symbol, name, asset_type, market, status, sort_order, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{symbol}, #{name}, #{assetType}, #{market}, #{status}, #{sortOrder}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE asset_info SET symbol = #{symbol}, name = #{name}, asset_type = #{assetType}, market = #{market}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE asset_info SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
